Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: Column, Column, Column; Column3D, Column3D, Column 3D; StackedColumn, StackedColumn, Stacked column; StackedColumn3D, StackedColumn3D, Stacked column 3D; StackedColumn100, StackedColumn100, 100% stacked column; Bar, Bar, Bar; StackedBar, StackedBar, Stacked bar; StackedBar100, StackedBar100, 100% stacked bar; Area, Area, Area; StackedArea, StackedArea, Stacked area; StackedArea100, StackedArea100, 100% stacked area; SmoothArea, SmoothArea, Smooth area; StepArea, StepArea, Step area; Line, Line, Line; StackedLine, StackedLine, Stacked line; StackedLine100, StackedLine100, 100% stacked line; SmoothLine, SmoothLine, Smooth line; StepLine, StepLine, Step line; Pie, Pie, Pie; Pie3D, Pie3D, Pie 3D; Doughnut, Doughnut, Doughnut; Doughnut3D, Doughnut3D, Doughnut 3D; LinearGauge, LinearGauge, Linear gauge; CircularGauge, CircularGauge, Circular gauge; Radar, Radar, Radar; FilledRadar, FilledRadar, Filled radar; PolarArea, PolarArea, Polar area; Funnel, Funnel, Funnel; Pyramid, Pyramid, Pyramid; ColumnLine, ColumnLine, Column & line; Column3DLine, Column3DLine, Column 3D & line; Timeline, Timeline, Timeline; SmoothTimeline, SmoothTimeline, Smooth timeline; StepTimeline, StepTimeline, Step timeline; Sparkline, Sparkline, Sparkline
